message:
test: add JSON fixture test runner for scroll region conformance (bd-3ftty)

Loads 26 VT scroll-region fixtures from tests/fixtures/vt-conformance/scroll_region/
and validates cursor position + cell content against both CoreHarness and
VirtualTerminal reference model. 25/26 pass; 1 known DECOM failure tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
